rulings.Case Title: J&M LAND RESTORATION, INC., A CALIFORNIA VS. STATE OF CALIFORNIA, DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Arbitration Award
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 25, 2007, LINE 6. RESPONDENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA, DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION'S Motion To Vacate Arbitration Award IS DENIED. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: J&M LAND RESTORATION, INC., A CALIFORNIA VS. STATE OF CALIFORNIA, DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Arbitration Award (Consolidated W/ Cpf-06-506861)
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 25, 2007, LINE 6. RESPONDENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA, DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION'S AMENDED Motion To Vacate Arbitration Award (Consolidated W/ 506861) IS DENIED. SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE SUPPORTS THE ARBITRATOR'S AWARD AND LEGAL ANALYSIS. THE RECORD SUPPORTS THE CONCLUSION THAT THE STATE'S LIQUIDATION DAMAGE CLAIM LACKED MERIT. AS A CONSEQUENCE, THE ARBITRATOR CORRECTLY AWARDED TWO PER CENT PER MONTH ON THE AMOUNT WITHHELD AND ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS. TEN PER CENT INTEREST WAS PROPERLY ASSESSED FOR EXTRA WORK AND LATE PROGRESS PAYMENTS (PUBLIC CONTRACTS SECTION 10261.5). THE NOTICE ISSUE WAS CORRECTLY ANALYZED. PETITIONER PRESENTED EVIDENCE OF EFFICIENCY DAMAGES UNDER EICHLEAY. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: BLOOMBERG NEWS VS. CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF INSURANCE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 25, 2007, LINE 7. PETITIONER BLOOMBERG NEWS' Petition For Writ Of Mandate: A HEARING IS REQUIRED TO DETERMINE THE PROCEDURE FOR A REVIEW, UNDER GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 6259, OF THE RECORDS SOUGHT AND THE RETENTION OF A SPECIAL MASTER TO DO SO. =(302/PJM/KD)
